  "text": "The Kubernetes API server audit logging implementation is spread across several packages in staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver.\n\n## Core audit package (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/)\n- context.go: AuditContext struct and context storage helpers (WithAuditContext, AuditContextFrom)\n- evaluator.go: PolicyRuleEvaluator interface and RequestAuditConfig struct\n- format.go: audit event formatting utilities\n- metrics.go: Prometheus metrics for audit events (dropped events counter, etc.)\n- request.go: Key functions for audit event creation from requests — NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogRequestPatch\n- scheme.go: audit scheme setup for serialization\n- types.go: Backend interface with ProcessEvents method\n- union.go: Union backend that dispatches events to multiple backends in parallel\n\n## Audit policy evaluation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/)\n- checker.go: NewPolicyRuleEvaluator — evaluates audit policy rules against requests to determine audit level\n- reader.go: LoadPolicyFromFile — reads audit policy configuration from file\n- util.go: policy utility helpers\n\n## Audit API types (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/)\n- types.go: Event, Policy, PolicyRule, Level, Stage types\n- helpers.go: helper functions for audit types\n- v1/types.go: versioned (v1) audit API types\n- v1/generated.pb.go: protobuf generated code\n- install/install.go: installs audit types into the scheme\n- validation/validation.go: validates audit Policy objects\n- fuzzer/fuzzer.go: fuzz testing support\n\n## Audit middleware/filters (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit — the main HTTP handler middleware that intercepts requests, evaluates policy, creates audit events at RequestReceived and ResponseComplete stages, and sends to backend\n- audit_init.go: WithAuditInit — initializes the audit context for each request\n- authn_audit.go: WithFailedAuthenticationAudit — logs failed authentication attempts\n\n## Audit backends (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/)\n- log/backend.go: File-based audit log backend (writes JSON/legacy format to file)\n- webhook/webhook.go: Webhook audit backend that POSTs events to an HTTP endpoint; NewDynamicBackend for dynamic configuration\n- truncate/truncate.go: Truncation backend wrapper that limits size of request/response bodies in audit events to prevent excessive log sizes\n- buffered/buffered.go: Buffered/batching backend wrapper that accumulates events and sends them in batches\n- fake/fake.go: In-memory fake backend for testing\n\n## Admission audit (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit decorator for admission handlers — propagates admission annotations into audit events\n\n## Backend dispatch configuration (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/)\n- audit.go: AuditOptions, AuditLogOptions, AuditWebhookOptions — wires together log backend, webhook backend, and truncate options; the ignoreErrorsBackend and appendBackend functions compose the final audit.Backend used by the server\n\n## Call chain summary\n1. WithAuditInit (filters/audit_init.go) — initializes audit context per request\n2. WithAudit (filters/audit.go) — evaluates policy, creates Event via NewEventFromRequest (request.go), logs RequestReceived; wraps ResponseWriter to capture response\n3. LogRequestObject/LogResponseObject (request.go) — called by endpoint handlers (create.go, update.go, delete.go, patch.go, responsewriters/writers.go) to populate request/response body in the audit event\n4. PolicyRuleEvaluator (policy/checker.go) — determines audit Level (None/Metadata/Request/RequestResponse) and OmitStages for the request\n5. Backend.ProcessEvents dispatched via union.go to: buffered backend → log backend (log/backend.go) and/or webhook backend (webhook/webhook.go), with optional truncate wrapping (truncate/truncate.go)"
}

The implementation spans several packages in `staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver`:

- **`request.go`** — `NewEventFromRequest`, `LogRequestObject`, `LogResponseObject`: creates audit events from HTTP requests

- **`fake/fake.go`** — in-memory fake backend for testing

- **`pkg/admission/audit.go`** — `WithAudit` admission decorator
- **`pkg/server/options/audit.go`** — wires up all backends (log + webhook + truncate → union)
- **`pkg/apis/audit/`** — Event/Policy types, v1 versioned types, install, validation, fuzzer

  "text": "The Kubernetes API server audit logging implementation is spread across several packages in staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver.\n\n## Core audit package (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/)\n- context.go: AuditContext struct and context storage helpers (WithAuditContext, AuditContextFrom)\n- evaluator.go: PolicyRuleEvaluator interface and RequestAuditConfig struct\n- format.go: audit event formatting utilities\n- metrics.go: Prometheus metrics for audit events (dropped events counter, etc.)\n- request.go: Key functions for audit event creation from requests — NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogRequestPatch\n- scheme.go: audit scheme setup for serialization\n- types.go: Backend interface with ProcessEvents method\n- union.go: Union backend that dispatches events to multiple backends in parallel\n\n## Audit policy evaluation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/)\n- checker.go: NewPolicyRuleEvaluator — evaluates audit policy rules against requests to determine audit level\n- reader.go: LoadPolicyFromFile — reads audit policy configuration from file\n- util.go: policy utility helpers\n\n## Audit API types (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/)\n- types.go: Event, Policy, PolicyRule, Level, Stage types\n- helpers.go: helper functions for audit types\n- v1/types.go: versioned (v1) audit API types\n- v1/generated.pb.go: protobuf generated code\n- install/install.go: installs audit types into the scheme\n- validation/validation.go: validates audit Policy objects\n- fuzzer/fuzzer.go: fuzz testing support\n\n## Audit middleware/filters (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit — the main HTTP handler middleware that intercepts requests, evaluates policy, creates audit events at RequestReceived and ResponseComplete stages, and sends to backend\n- audit_init.go: WithAuditInit — initializes the audit context for each request\n- authn_audit.go: WithFailedAuthenticationAudit — logs failed authentication attempts\n\n## Audit backends (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/)\n- log/backend.go: File-based audit log backend (writes JSON/legacy format to file)\n- webhook/webhook.go: Webhook audit backend that POSTs events to an HTTP endpoint; NewDynamicBackend for dynamic configuration\n- truncate/truncate.go: Truncation backend wrapper that limits size of request/response bodies in audit events to prevent excessive log sizes\n- buffered/buffered.go: Buffered/batching backend wrapper that accumulates events and sends them in batches\n- fake/fake.go: In-memory fake backend for testing\n\n## Admission audit (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit decorator for admission handlers — propagates admission annotations into audit events\n\n## Backend dispatch configuration (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/)\n- audit.go: AuditOptions, AuditLogOptions, AuditWebhookOptions — wires together log backend, webhook backend, and truncate options; the ignoreErrorsBackend and appendBackend functions compose the final audit.Backend used by the server\n\n## Call chain summary\n1. WithAuditInit (filters/audit_init.go) — initializes audit context per request\n2. WithAudit (filters/audit.go) — evaluates policy, creates Event via NewEventFromRequest (request.go), logs RequestReceived; wraps ResponseWriter to capture response\n3. LogRequestObject/LogResponseObject (request.go) — called by endpoint handlers (create.go, update.go, delete.go, patch.go, responsewriters/writers.go) to populate request/response body in the audit event\n4.   "text": "The Kubernetes API server audit logging implementation is spread across several packages in staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver.\n\n## Core audit package RequestAuditConfig struct\n- format.go: audit event formatting utilities\n- metrics.go: Prometheus metrics for audit events (dropped events counter, etc.)\n- request.go: Key functions for audit event creation from requests — NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogRequestPatch\n- scheme.go: audit scheme setup for serialization\n- types.go: Backend interface with ProcessEvents method\n- union.go: Union backend that dispatches events to multiple backends in parallel\n\n## Audit policy evaluation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/)\n- checker.go: NewPolicyRuleEvaluator — evaluates audit policy rules against requests to determine audit level\n- reader.go: LoadPolicyFromFile — reads audit policy configuration from file\n- util.go: policy utility helpers\n\n## Audit API types (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/)\n- types.go: Event, Policy, PolicyRule, Level, Stage types\n- helpers.go: helper functions for audit types\n- v1/types.go: versioned (v1) audit API types\n- v1/generated.pb.go: protobuf generated code\n- install/install.go: installs audit types into the scheme\n- validation/validation.go: validates audit Policy objects\n- fuzzer/fuzzer.go: fuzz testing support\n\n## Audit middleware/filters (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit — the main HTTP handler middleware that intercepts requests, evaluates policy, creates audit events at RequestReceived and ResponseComplete stages, and sends to backend\n- audit_init.go: WithAuditInit — initializes the audit context for each request\n- authn_audit.go: WithFailedAuthenticationAudit — logs failed authentication attempts\n\n## Audit backends (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/)\n- log/backend.go: File-based audit log backend (writes JSON/legacy format to file)\n- webhook/webhook.go: Webhook audit backend that POSTs events to an HTTP endpoint; NewDynamicBackend for dynamic configuration\n- truncate/truncate.go: Truncation backend wrapper that limits size of request/response bodies in audit events to prevent excessive log sizes\n- buffered/buffered.go: Buffered/batching backend wrapper that accumulates events and sends them in batches\n- fake/fake.go: In-memory fake backend for testing\n\n## Admission audit (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit decorator for admission handlers — propagates admission annotations into audit events\n\n## Backend dispatch configuration (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/)\n- audit.go: AuditOptions, AuditLogOptions, AuditWebhookOptions — wires together log backend, webhook backend, and truncate options; the ignoreErrorsBackend and appendBackend functions compose the final audit.Backend used by the server\n\n## (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/)\n- context.go: AuditContext struct and context storage helpers (WithAuditContext, AuditContextFrom)\n- evaluator.go: PolicyRuleEvaluator interface and RequestAuditConfig struct\n- format.go: audit event formatting utilities\n- metrics.go: Prometheus metrics for audit events (dropped events counter, etc.)\n- request.go: Key functions for audit event creation from requests: NewEventFromRequest, LogRequestObject, LogResponseObject, LogRequestPatch\n- scheme.go: audit scheme setup for serialization\n- types.go: Backend interface with ProcessEvents method\n- union.go: Union backend that dispatches events to multiple backends\n\n## Audit policy evaluation (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/audit/policy/)\n- checker.go: NewPolicyRuleEvaluator evaluates audit policy rules against requests to determine audit Level and OmitStages\n- reader.go: LoadPolicyFromFile reads audit policy configuration from file\n- util.go: policy utility helpers\n\n## Audit API types (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/apis/audit/)\n- types.go: Event, Policy, PolicyRule, Level, Stage internal types\n- helpers.go: helper functions for audit types\n- v1/types.go: versioned (v1) audit API types\n- v1/generated.pb.go: protobuf generated code\n- install/install.go: installs audit types into the scheme\n- validation/validation.go: validates audit Policy objects\n- fuzzer/fuzzer.go: fuzz testing support\n\n## Audit middleware/filters (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/endpoints/filters/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit is the main HTTP handler middleware that intercepts requests, evaluates policy, creates audit events at RequestReceived and ResponseComplete stages, and sends to backend\n- audit_init.go: WithAuditInit initializes the audit context for each request\n- authn_audit.go: WithFailedAuthenticationAudit logs failed authentication attempts\n\n## Audit backends (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/plugin/pkg/audit/)\n- log/backend.go: File-based audit log backend that writes JSON/legacy format to a file\n- webhook/webhook.go: Webhook audit backend that POSTs events to an HTTP endpoint; NewDynamicBackend for dynamic configuration\n- truncate/truncate.go: Truncation backend wrapper that limits size of request/response bodies in audit events to prevent excessive log sizes\n- buffered/buffered.go: Buffered/batching backend wrapper that accumulates events and sends them in batches\n- fake/fake.go: In-memory fake backend for testing\n\n## Admission audit (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/)\n- audit.go: WithAudit decorator for admission handlers that propagates admission annotations into audit events\n\n## Backend dispatch configuration (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/server/options/)\n- audit.go: AuditOptions, AuditLogOptions, AuditWebhookOptions wire together log backend, webhook backend, and truncate options; the appendBackend function composes the final audit.Backend\n\n## Call chain\n1. WithAuditInit (filters/audit_init.go) initializes audit context per request\n2. WithAudit (filters/audit.go) evaluates policy, creates Event via NewEventFromRequest (request.go), logs RequestReceived; wraps ResponseWriter to capture response at ResponseComplete\n3. LogRequestObject/LogResponseObject (request.go) called by endpoint handlers (create.go, update.go, delete.go, patch.go, responsewriters/writers.go) to populate request/response body in the audit event\n4. PolicyRuleEvaluator (policy/checker.go) determines audit Level (None/Metadata/Request/RequestResponse) and OmitStages for each request\n5. Backend.ProcessEvents dispatched via union.go to: buffered backend (buffered.go) wrapping log backend (log/backend.go) and/or webhook backend (webhook/webhook.go), optionally with truncation (truncate/truncate.go) to cap event sizes"
